summary: Phase 10 - Tested Campaign Wizard DV360-style redesign. Found and fixed critical bug where wizard sent creative_ids (array) instead of creative_id (string) expected by backend API. All 5 wizard steps, validation, creation, and edit flows now working.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Wizard was sending creative_ids (array) instead of creative_id (string) expected by API
integration_issues.fix_applied: Modified CampaignWizard.jsx line 269 to send creative_id: form.creative_ids[0]

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Pydantic validation errors (array format) were not being displayed properly
integration_issues.fix_applied: Added proper error handling for array-based validation errors in catch block

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/CampaignWizard.jsx - Fixed creative_id payload and error handling
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Wizard_Create_Final campaign during testing, deleted after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Campaign Wizard uses DV360-style 5-step flow: Basics, Budget, Targeting, Creatives, Settings. Old CampaignForm.jsx removed - /campaigns/new and /campaigns/:id/edit both use CampaignWizard.jsx. Backend expects creative_id (string) not creative_ids (array).

campaign_wizard_navigation.step_1_basics: PASS - Campaign name, advertiser, description, start/end dates
campaign_wizard_navigation.step_2_budget: PASS - Bid price, currency, daily/total budget, pacing type
campaign_wizard_navigation.step_3_targeting: PASS - Geographic targeting, device types, operating systems
campaign_wizard_navigation.step_4_creatives: PASS - Creative selection with visual feedback (checkmark)
campaign_wizard_navigation.step_5_settings: PASS - Priority, frequency capping, bid shading, ML-powered bidding

campaign_wizard_validation.name_required: PASS - Cannot proceed from Step 1 without campaign name
campaign_wizard_validation.creative_required: PASS - Cannot proceed from Step 4 without selecting a creative

campaign_creation.save_as_draft: PASS - Successfully creates campaign with 'draft' status
campaign_creation.create_active: PASS - Successfully creates campaign with 'active' status
campaign_creation.redirect_after_save: PASS - Redirects to /campaigns after successful creation

campaign_edit.pre_populated_fields: PASS - Campaign name and other fields pre-filled
campaign_edit.all_steps_completed: PASS - All steps show green checkmarks in edit mode
campaign_edit.update_button: PASS - Shows 'Update campaign' instead of 'Create campaign'

campaigns_page.single_create_button: PASS - Only 'Create Campaign' button (no duplicate form)

sidebar_navigation.step_indicators: PASS - Blue active, green completed, gray pending
sidebar_navigation.back_to_campaigns: PASS - Back link in sidebar header

creative_id_mismatch.description: Campaign creation failed with 422 error - creative_id field required
creative_id_mismatch.root_cause: Wizard sent creative_ids (array) but backend expected creative_id (string)
creative_id_mismatch.fix: Changed line 269 from 'creative_ids: form.creative_ids' to 'creative_id: form.creative_ids[0]'

error_display.description: Pydantic validation errors displayed as '[object Object]'
error_display.root_cause: Error detail was array of objects, toast tried to render object directly
error_display.fix: Added array check and proper message extraction in error catch block
